Type Property# connectionAccepted

iOS 26.0+iPadOS 26.0+Mac Catalyst 26.0+macOS 26.0+tvOS 26.0+visionOS 26.0+watchOS 26.0+

```
static var connectionAccepted: NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<FileHandle.ConnectionAcceptedMessage> { get }
```
